semantic_text:
[619] Fixed simple cards bug (#127)

Fixed a few Simple cards widget bugs:
- set the width of the Simple Cards widget to 900px
- set margin inside the cards to correct values according to Figma design

## Summary
- add `Destroy AWS Environment` workflow that mirrors the environment choices from `deploy_to_aws.yml` and runs `terraform destroy`

## Testing
- `npm test` *(fails: package.json not found)*

------
https://chatgpt.com/codex/tasks/task_e_68418e9fb600832ca48e2d6c0a4bd0a0

- Add GitHub workflow for destroying AWS environments
- Include manual workflow dispatch with environment selection
- Add plan-only option to preview destruction without executing
- Implement three-stage process: destroy-plan, manual-approval, destroy-apply
- Add proper permissions for issue writing
- Include placeholder steps for future implementation

This workflow is necessary to provide a safe and controlled way to destroy AWS environments when they are no longer needed, helping to reduce infrastructure costs and maintain clean environments.

Add conditional approval for AWS environment destruction

- Skip manual approval for Development environment destruction

- Add both destroy-plan and manual-approval as dependencies for destroy-apply job

- Update destroy-apply condition to handle Development environment without approval

Added animation to buttons (#134)

Added animation to buttons

Optimize GitHub Actions destroy workflow conditions

- Simplify plan_only boolean expressions using negation syntax

- Move conditional from job level to step level in manual-approval

- Simplify job dependencies in destroy-apply workflow

[658] feat: Remove orphan field from page types (#143)

- Add global page-type module to remove orphan field
- Remove orphan field from home-page module
- Remove orphan field from case-studies-page module
- Remove orphan field from default-page module

This removes the 'hide in navigation' option (orphan field) from all
page types to streamline the content management interface and eliminate
unused functionality.

Bump the npm_and_yarn group across 1 directory with 1 update (#145)

Bumps the npm_and_yarn group with 1 update in the /website directory:
[tar-fs](https://github.com/mafintosh/tar-fs).
Add destroy workflow for AWS

[618] Fixed incorrect display of buttons (#131)

Fixed bug with incorrect display of buttons

[617] Make Read the full story button conditional (#125)

- added a new field for a URL in the Admin panel for the Case Study entity
- displayed the "Read the full story" CTA button only if the URL is present

Refactor destroy workflow input parameter naming

- Rename destroy-plan-only to plan_only for consistency
- Update all references to use snake_case naming convention
- Improve parameter name readability in workflow conditions

[459] Create styles for displaying Categories & Tags (#120)

This PR adds styles for displaying categories and tags in the case
studies section, including:
- Updated SCSS styles for categories and
- Modified case studies page layout
- Added check mark SVG icon

[660] feat: Enhance testing infrastructure with Jest configuration (#141)

- Add jest-environment-jsdom for browser environment testing
- Configure Jest to use jsdom environment with proper module and file
settings
- Create scripts directory for test utilities
- Update SonarQube coverage exclusions to include jest.setup.js

Add QuickBooksRepositoryError class and corresponding tests (#51)

- Introduced `QuickBooksRepositoryError` class extending `AppError` for
standardized error handling related to QuickBooks operations.
- Updated `index.ts` to export the new error class.
- Created unit tests for `QuickBooksRepositoryError` to validate message
and name assignment.

These changes enhance error management for QuickBooks integration and
improve test coverage for error handling.

[594] Add the ability to search case studies tags (#114)

- Refactor case studies page to support filtering by industry, stack,
and case study type
- Add per-tag-type search input and client-side filtering for tags
- Update case study and testimonial templates for new tag relationships
- Add new vacancies piece type and vacancies-list widget
- Improve team members schema and layout
- Add 404 SVG image

This PR is needed to provide more flexible filtering for case studies,
improve content relationships, and introduce a vacancies listing
feature.

[643] Update wget package version in dockerfile (#140)

Updated wget package version to 1.25.0-r1

Update wget version to 1.25.0-r1 in Dockerfile

- Update wget package version from 1.25.0-r0 to 1.25.0-r1

Refactor Google Sheets service into modular architecture

- Extract FormDataFormatter class for data formatting logic
- Add GoogleSheetsAuthProvider for authentication management
- Create GoogleSheetsClient for API interaction abstraction
- Implement GoogleSheetsErrorHandler for centralized error handling
- Add GoogleSheetsFormSubmissionHandler as main orchestrator
- Include comprehensive unit tests for all new classes
- Remove monolithic googleSheetsService.js and legacy tests
- Add refactoring documentation summary

Fixed error message in terminal about categories (#135)

Fixed error message in terminal about categories
